stemHtml:
An aircraft flies at flight level 40. Elevation of the aerodrome: 990 ft; QNH 976 hPa.The tower clears the pilot to fly at 3000 ft QNH. Which of the following statements is correct?
(Barometric lapse rate: 27 ft/hPa)

options.a: The aircraft has to descend about 1000 ft.
options.b: The aircraft has to descend about 2000 ft.
options.c: Only a small change of altitude is necessary.
options.d: The aircraft has to climb about 1000 ft.
